creator: sheldonh@uunet.co.za
text:
On Wed, 12 Apr 2000 09:43:58 CST, handy@physics.montana.edu wrote:

> --- mailwrapper.8.orig	Tue Apr 11 23:16:59 2000
> +++ mailwrapper.8	Tue Apr 11 23:17:29 2000
> @@ -52,7 +52,7 @@
>  .Pp
>  Times have changed, however.
>  On a modern
> -.Nx
> +.Bx
>  system, the administrator may wish to use one of several
>  available MTAs.
>  .Pp

Since mailwrapper's likely to be used on lots of systems, .Ux is
probably going to be the most practical macro.

Would you be happy with that?

Ciao,
Sheldon.
